calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-05-2025 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-05-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter was set for Court Trial and sent forthwith from Department 206 for a request for Judgment against Defendant Taliah Langer.

Dept.505; Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiff: Deputy Jones; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 11:08:27 a.m. and concluding at 11:11:10 a.m.(D505)

Roger Jackson, Esq. specially appearing for Plaintiff TD Bank USA, N.A.
Defendant Taliah Langer not appearing.

Counsel to provide offer proof as to the request for judgment.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant.

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant the following:

Damages $6,848.82
Attorney's Fees $0
Interest $0
Costs $314.00
Total Judgment $7,162.82

Plaintiff to submit a proposed judgment for review and signature of the court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Request For Admissions To Defnedant Admitted
Off Calendar Feb-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jonathan Vaknin, Esq., Vaknin Law, 415-851-5297, appearance@vakninlaw.com, Specially appearing for Plaintiff TD BANK USA, N.A.
no other appearances

Matter is not contested. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A.'S Motion For Order Deeming Request For Admissions To Defendant Admitted

Granted. No opposition and good cause shown.

Order is signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Set For Trial On May-05-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
